response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified songs 'ぼうやの夢よ' and 'プラネタリウム' from on-screen text. 2. Performed search for 'ぼうやの夢よ' lyrics. Identified as a lullaby associated with Re:Zero (Emilia). 3. Performed search for 'プラネタリウム' and confirmed it is the song by Ai Otsuka. 4. Compiled lyrics and translation for both. 5. Noted performers: Shirogane Noel (Solo) and Shirogane Noel & Shiranui Flare (Duet).
response.global_summary: The video features a live musical performance by VTubers Shirogane Noel and Shiranui Flare. It consists of two songs, starting with a solo performance of "ぼうやの夢よ" followed by a duet of "プラネタリウム".

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel performs "ぼうやの夢よ" while sitting in a virtual boat on a stage. Song title appears on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
小さな人の子よ
森へ迷い込んだ
大きなこの羽根が
ぼうやは見えないのね
なにも知らない
まあるいほっぺよ
眠れや眠れ！
静かな水辺においで
ぼうやの夢は龍の背に運ばれて
山の向こうへ消える
よろずの子らも並んで眠る
七つ数えたら仲良く眠ってく
何も見えない
小さなお目目よ
眠れや眠れ！
そよぐ草むらへおいで
ぼうやの夢は母さんを探しては
空の向こうへ帰る
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Little human child,
You've wandered into the forest.
This large wing,
You can't see it, can you?
Knowing nothing,
With your round cheeks,
Sleep, oh sleep!
Come to the quiet waterside.
Your dream will be carried on the back of a dragon,
And vanish beyond the mountains.
All the children, too, sleep in a row.
When you count to seven,
Sleep peacefully together,
With your little eyes that see nothing.
Sleep, oh sleep!
Come to the rustling grasses.
Your dream will go searching for your mother,
And return beyond the sky.
